engaged_works.summary: This on-disk text is being wired into the Source tab as a citation witness for Arthur Schopenhauer, Wwv Band1. The entry is intentionally minimal: it records the routed file and basic bibliographic shape so the site can surface the source while fuller review waits. A later pass should tighten the title, edition, and passage coverage against the on-disk witness.

core_thesis: Schopenhauer distinguishes the world as representation from the world as will, the blind striving disclosed immediately in embodiment ([World as Will and Representation I §1](cite://schopenhauer/the-world-as-will-and-representation/1.1); [I §18](cite://schopenhauer/the-world-as-will-and-representation/1.18)). Since individuation belongs to representation, plurality is phenomenal, not ultimate ([I §23](cite://schopenhauer/the-world-as-will-and-representation/1.23)). Ethics begins in compassion, and liberation is sought in ascetic denial of willing ([I §66](cite://schopenhauer/the-world-as-will-and-representation/1.66); [I §68](cite://schopenhauer/the-world-as-will-and-representation/1.68)).
